title: Guaraní
overview: It tells the odyssey of Atilio and his granddaughter traveling to Buenos Aires, from Paraguay, his native country. The landscapes that run, the characters they encounter along the way, each with their own way of seeing the world.

trailers.title: GUARANÍ - Trailer Oficial
trailers.channel_name: GUARANÍ - TRAILER OFICIAL ESTRENO 7 DE ABRIL!!!!
